name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)

magical_effect.effect: Contains a 1st-level spell. If the spell is on your class spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell. The scroll crumbles to dust after use.

description: A spell scroll bears the words of a single 1st-level spell, written in a mystical cipher. DC 13 ability check required if the spell is not on your class spell list.
